question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Europa Island will be higher on 2026-04-05 than on 2026-03-29?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61972.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-29 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-03-19) was 29.288. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Europa Island.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - EUROPA - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61972.D.
